body.title: UU_ROOT env var: auto-detect utility + shell setup docs
body.result: uu_root() auto-detects from package __file__; works without UU_ROOT set; CLAUDE.md updated
body.intention: I intend that UU_ROOT resolves correctly on any machine without manual configuration, falling back to package location detection when the env var is not set.
body.description:
Add unseen_university/_uu_root.py with a uu_root() function that: (1) returns UU_ROOT env var if set, (2) detects from unseen_university.__file__ parent chain, (3) falls back to pip show location. Update CLAUDE.md env var section to document UU_ROOT and IGOR_HOME as the two canonical vars. Mark CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS as derived (= ${UU_ROOT}/lab/claudecode).

**Affected files:** unseen_university/_uu_root.py (new), CLAUDE.md
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Detection utility + docs only. No migration of existing CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS references — that is T-uu-root-migrate-skills.
**Completion criteria:** python3 -c "from unseen_university._uu_root import uu_root; print(uu_root())" prints the repo root on this machine; works when UU_ROOT is unset.
